'''GamorrCare''' was the name of a company that specialized in providing medicinal hygenic products to [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] clients. One of its more popular brand-name products was [[TuskBlaster]], a polish used to eliminate yellow stains from a Gamorrean's tusks, which it put an advertisement for on [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:GamorrCare.gif|thumb|left|350px|An advertisement for TuskBlaster from GamorrCare.]]
GamorrCare first appeared in [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]], a website published prior to the release of {{Film|II}}. Advertisements for TuskBlaster, a product made by GamorrCare, appeared in many issues of HoloNet News.
